title: Gendos third impact
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's third impact             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Wed Sep 23, 2009 11:12 am Maybe this question has already been answered but what would have happened if Gendo had initiated his version of third impact? Would everybody have been turned into LCL except him and Yui or would everybody just be LCL with no chance of escape?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 23, 2009 11:39 am Everyone would've been fine, as all souls would've been collected in Unit 01 temporarily to ride out Third Impact. Afterwards, everyone would be released and allowed to rematerialize. Gendo would've stayed in the Eva with Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Wed Sep 23, 2009 11:43 am If that was the case then what was that whole scene where the Prime Minister is talking about Nerv plotting the destruction of the human race talking about?

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Sep 23, 2009 12:17 pm ^ There would still have been Third Impact, it's just that humanity would come out of it more-or-less intact. It'd still have been extremely devastating to social infrastructure and... well... everything else, but nobody would have actually died in the process. Now, post-3I there'd probably be tons of suffering due to the lack of infrastructure, and people would undoubtedly die THEN, but that isn't the point. Civilization getting hit with the reboot button was the point. The Prime Minister was probably just assuming that 3I=apocalypse=everybody dies, not 3I=apocalypse=civilization dies. Not to mention any propaganda SEELE probably fed to him/the rest of the government.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 23, 2009 12:33 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Everyone would've been fine, as all souls would've been collected in Unit 01 temporarily to ride out Third Impact. Afterwards, everyone would be released and allowed to rematerialize. Gendo would've stayed in the Eva with Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 23, 2009 1:03 pm Merridian wrote: Not to mention any propaganda SEELE probably fed to him/the rest of the government.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Wed Sep 23, 2009 1:27 pm So, basically, if Gendo had been in charge, the world would've been in better shape than with Shinji? What about the Angels? What would happen if they instigated it?

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Sep 23, 2009 1:42 pm Adekis wrote: So, basically, if Gendo had been in charge, the world would've been in better shape than with Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:29 pm Merridian wrote: Everybody would have died, and the Angels would have lived forever. LCL-based life forms would have been killed off in favor of the PWM-based life-forms.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:33 pm Dranzer wrote: A little off: Angels?Living on earth?

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:44 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Dranzer wrote: A little off: Angels?Living on earth?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:49 pm I'm not convinced there would have necessarily been an impact at all if Gendo got his way. Maybe he would have just taken Rei with him into 01, then the resulting gestalt would rule over humanity as a new god.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Wed Sep 23, 2009 3:59 pm So pretty much all we know is that Gendo wanted to use Rei to attain god powers and what he would have done with those god powers besides reunite himself with Yui is uncertain?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Sep 23, 2009 6:34 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Everyone would've been fine, as all souls would've been collected in Unit 01 temporarily to ride out Third Impact. Afterwards, everyone would be released and allowed to rematerialize. Gendo would've stayed in the Eva with Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Sep 23, 2009 9:11 pm Iam(not)toji wrote: So pretty much all we know is that Gendo wanted to use Rei to attain god powers and what he would have done with those god powers besides reunite himself with Yui is uncertain?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Sep 23, 2009 10:57 pm I like the manga's take on Gendo's plans. He doesn't just want to be reunited with Yui, he wants to remain a God. Of course the anime isn't the manga, but I never got very benevolent vibes from anime Gendo either.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Wed Sep 23, 2009 11:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Dranzer wrote: A little off: Angels?Living on earth?

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Sep 24, 2009 12:30 am Adekis wrote: He's a lot more complex and definitely more human. Would his aims have been SEELE's, or would he have had his own goals in mind?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Sep 24, 2009 11:41 am SEELE didn't mean for him to die. Not to begin with, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 24, 2009 1:41 pm Yes, they did. They pretty much sent him on a suicide mission.
